content.text: Senior Frontend Engineer with over 10 years of experience developing accessible user interfaces for complex cloud-integrated software applications.

Expert in React, TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux, Next.js, Angular, Ionic, Vue, Node.js, and Java, with a strong track record building enterprise-level applications connected to APIs, data services, and cloud infrastructure.

Experienced technical leader who has launched production applications, led accessibility initiatives, coached junior developers, performed code reviews, and coordinated across design, product, backend, DevOps, and engineering teams.
Highly knowledgeable in cloud, web, and client/server applications, including analysis, design, coding, testing, implementation, deployment, and operational support across AWS and Azure environments.
Cross trained in UX design, user stories, and workflows. Experienced in developing prototypes, wireframes, and mockups via Figma, Axure, MockFlow, and Photoshop.

linkset.title: Amazon / AWS
linkset.text: Former Senior Software Engineer at Amazon and Senior Frontend Engineer at AWS

linkset.title: Nike
linkset.text: Former Senior Frontend Developer at Nike

linkset.title: HP
linkset.text: Former Senior Frontend Developer at HP

group.description: Adair Futures is a consulting firm focused on providing high-quality UI development, expert technical guidance, and strategic insights to clients like Intuit, SDG&E, and T-Mobile.

group.text: Consult on seven projects at top AI research labs (via Mercor Intelligence), helping drive forward AI code generation standards by evaluating, reviewing, grading, and shaping over 1000 instances of AI generated code created in assistance with myself or other consultants.
Lead accessibility initiatives for client projects, ensuring compliance with WCAG 2.1 AA standards using tools such as axe, NVDA, and pa11y.
Created data tables, views, and components for the SDG&E Builder Services Portal to enable users to view and download CSVs for service meters and permit data using React 18 with Hooks and Context.

Developed data fetching, management, and pagination features for a live project tracker in React 18, allowing Intuit project managers to search, filter, edit, and view detailed information for all projects.
Develop and launch the full-stack Keto Mate suite of apps using Angular, Ionic, and NodeJS, which has attracted over 20k users and maintains a 4* rating on Google Play.

Led the design and implementation of a global content delivery network using CloudFront, alongside a transition to video streaming. Achieving 79% improvement in P90 loading speed and 84% reduction in variance for video streams across North America, Europe, and Asia.

Engineered a TypeScript CDK stack for dynamic provisioning of CloudFront infrastructure, enabling rapid deployment and scaling across multiple stages and regions, reducing infrastructure provisioning time from days to hours.

Overhauled critical UI elements and developed new interactive components and views in React 18 with TypeScript, significantly improving UX by streamlining workflows, enhancing clarity in ergonomic assessment comparisons, and better facilitating workplace safety initiatives.
Successfully migrated the backend application from JDK 11 to 21, addressing deprecated code patterns and ensuring seamless integration and improved stability across the CI/CD pipeline.

Developed and deployed a Java-based file signing service for time-limited access to CloudFront downloads, enhancing security and user experience, enhancing security by eliminating unauthorized downloads and significantly improving auditability and compliance.

Developed key features for AWS QuickSight accessibility certification effort, including live screen reader status system for reactive searches and roaming highlights, and focus management for global tab navigation and panel rendering, using React 17, TypeScript, and ES6.

Created new and accessibility updated components for AWS Vega component library, including programmatic determination of aria-label and other accessibility attributes, and visual updates for color contrast, hover, and focus states using Storybook and Material UI Theming.
Investigated, documented, and ticketed complex accessibility issues across AWS Quicksight involving the use of data filters and themes across different types of sheets, charts, and tables.
Maintained accessibility, code quality, and data integrity through testing (React Testing Library, axe, Sinon, Enzyme), bug fixes, user stories, and code reviews.
Collaborated with cross team designers and engineers to ensure accessibility updates are synchronized with new features and designs using Figma, Slack, Chime, and AWS cloud developer environments.
Created key features for cybersecurity education platform including a React 18 micro-frontend portal to paired HackEDU app, using postMessage to safely send user and lesson status.
Developed new and updated components for internal component library with focus on user experience and accessibility, using React, Storybook, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
Engineered new features for interacting with video, audio, and questions across SJ learning platform using React, Next.js, ES6, and Typescript.
Setup CI/CD accessibility testing with Github Actions for ongoing compliance, monitoring fresh builds for accessibility issues via full page testing, using pa11y CI, JAWS, and axe.
Investigated, ticketed, and addressed accessibility issues on the SJ learning platform, enhancing keyboard navigation, screen reader support, roaming map highlights, and user leaderboards.
Collaborated with and coached junior frontend developers, setting up weekly 1:1s, performing gaps assessments, code reviews, and helped create and follow through on learning plans.

Designed and implemented key frontend UI components for the $2Bn Korean market launch of the Nike SNKRS Launch global e-commerce platform, integrating Korean payment services (Fiserv and KakaoPay) and building a stateless API-connected address autocomplete using React 18, Redux, Next.js, Docker, ES6, and AWS.
Developed analytics, tests, and remote component integration for dual micro frontends using JavaScript, New Relic, SSR, REST APIs, and Mocha, improving performance monitoring and testing reliability.

Expanded functionality and innovated new features for the v3 global launch of the SNKRS Launch checkout micro-frontend, aligning with modern UX principles and contributing to an enhanced user experience.

Collaborated globally with cross-functional teams, ensuring project progress through agile methodologies (Git, Jira, Confluence, Zoom), while maintaining code quality and data integrity through rigorous testing (unit, integration, type), bug fixes, and code reviews.

group.description: Alluma is a non-profit specializing in technological solutions to state and local governments, and community organizations to connect clients to services from Medicaid and SNAP to EITC.

group.text: Architected and led the development of the Solution Engine, a frontend app engine that utilizes live loaded JSON configuration files to generate data driven frontend applications that are WCAG 2.1 AA validated, have multilingual support, and are unit tested out of the box, with test case applications being built alongside for assessing benefit eligibility in California and Tennessee, using React 17 Hooks and Context.
Created an accessible 100+ element UI library with React Hooks, CSS Variables, and Grid, published as a private npm package in collaboration with the Lead UX Researcher.
Led React frontend development for the One-x-Connection healthcare app, transitioning from class-based components to React Hooks, achieving a successful launch and post-launch features.
Oversaw, coached, and performed code reviews for the frontend team, including senior and junior developers. Advocated for and began weekly check in and coaching sessions.
Coordinated with other team leads remotely to keep projects moving on time with design sessions, backlog grooming, sprint planning and retrospectives.
Overhauled frontend UI for internal B2B printer sales contract system, with new dashboard layout implementing task queue navigation. Led to 43% reduction in time spent navigating tasks.
Created the client building and floor layout levels of data management with reusable components, frontend views and services using Angular 8 and TypeScript.
Developed backend services, API endpoints, setup database queries, and managed database schema using Javascript, Sequelize, NodeJS, and PostgreSQL.
Coordinated with other team members across the globe to keep projects moving on time through JIRA, team GIT repositories, Scrum meetings, Skype, and Zoom.
Developed PayZoom payroll Android app using NodeJS, Angular 7, and Ionic, leading a team of 4 developers/designers.
Created real-time data charts that pulled live information from Azure hosted databases using PowerBI to present to client business owners.
Performed code reviews of code developed by team members, helped manage team GIT repository.

group.description: Server Sky is a small space firm looking to develop the research necessary to, and then implement a space based swarm cloud server capable of providing datacenter level computing across the globe.

group.text: Developed a quantitative predictive model for Server Sky Rutherford scattering of relativistic radiation present in our magnetosphere from the Inner Van Allen Belt.
Researched the radiation environment of the Inner Van Allen Belt, particularly around the L2 shell.
Delivered talks about research at academic and industry conferences.
Currently On Hold - Finished Junior Year
Major: Physics
Extracurriculars: Physics Society Officer
Assisted Professor Guang-jiong Ni with research on mass aquisition for massless fermions via vacuum phase transition using an effective Hamiltonian.
Established Futures Studies course as part of the Chiron Studies program.
Graduated with an Associate of Science
Major: Physics
Extracurriculars: PTK Honors Society Officer
Utiilized courses from schools like Harvard, MIT, and Yale from providers like EdX, Udacity, and Coursera.
Other learning through sites such as Codeacademy, Lynda.com, Pluralsight, and Youtube.
